feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Antman and Red reached Mr. Fuji's rescue floor in Pokemon Tower.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Red held the tower stairwell while Antman moved toward Mr. Fuji.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill confirmed the Silph Scope signal is clean enough to separate Rocket's trap from Team Moonlight's dream residue.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: A Rocket guard is holding Mr. Fuji near the Poke Flute case.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Team Moonlight's tower signal is retreating, but it left enough pressure to empower Rocket's guard.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: The Rocket tower guard battle is unlocked.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Mr. Fuji was rescued from Pokemon Tower.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill marked the Snorlax wake path as open now that the Poke Flute is recovered.
